creator: umq@ueo.co.jp
text:
The new version of dkim-milter 1.1.0 has been released.
	Release notes: http://sourceforge.net/project/shownotes.php?release_id=516456

Fix: The patch follows afterwards:

	new in this patch
	 - update to 1.1.0
	 - use bsd.milter.mk following mail/dk-milter update
	 - deprecate SENDMAIL_MILTER_IN_BASE, prefer WITH_SENDMAIL_BASE
	 - delete files/patch-libar-Makefile.m4
How-To-Repeat: 	N/A
